Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandamus To Review Administrative Decision
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER NATHANIAL TURNER'S Petition For Writ Of Mandamus To Review Administrative Decision is taken off calendar. The case was transferred to El Dorado County. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
